name: squoosh-kit
description: Per-feature adapters around Squoosh codecs, worker/client runtimes.
author: Brent Nowak <bnowak008@gmail.com>

scripts.build: bun --filter @squoosh-kit/runtime build && bun --filter '{@squoosh-kit/webp,@squoosh-kit/resize,@squoosh-kit/mozjpeg,@squoosh-kit/avif,@squoosh-kit/jxl,@squoosh-kit/oxipng,@squoosh-kit/imagequant,@squoosh-kit/png,@squoosh-kit/qoi,@squoosh-kit/wp2,@squoosh-kit/hqx,@squoosh-kit/rotate,@squoosh-kit/visdif,@squoosh-kit/vite-plugin}' build && bun --filter @squoosh-kit/core build && bun --filter '@squoosh-kit/squoosh' build
scripts.ci:build: bun run sync-codecs && bun run build
scripts.clean: find . -name 'node_modules' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && find . -name 'dist' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && find . -name 'dev-dist' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && find . -name 'bundle' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && find . -name 'tsconfig.tsbuildinfo' -type f -delete && find . -name 'bun.lockb' -type f -delete  && find . -name 'bun.lock' -type f -delete
scripts.validate: bun run check-types && bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run test
scripts.quick-release: bun run clean && bun i && bun run format && bun run test && bun run ci:build && bun run validate:artifacts && bun run validate && bun run release
scripts.quick-release:publish: bun run quick-release && bun run version:patch && bun run release:publish
scripts.release: bun run release:core --dry-run && bun run release:runtime --dry-run && bun run release:resize --dry-run && bun run release:webp --dry-run && bun run release:vite-plugin --dry-run
scripts.release:publish: bun run release:runtime && bun run release:webp && bun run release:resize && bun run release:core && bun run release:vite-plugin
